metrics.label: Operating expenditure per resident
metrics.description: Sum of municipal Nettoaufwand across core service areas (administration, education, health, social security, transport, environment, culture, public order). Excludes Finanzen/Steuern and Volkswirtschaft, which are mainly fiscal transfers rather than service spending.

metrics.label: Gross debt ratio
metrics.description: Debt as a share of total municipal assets (Bruttoverschuldungsanteil).

metrics.label: Investment share of spending
metrics.description: Share of municipal expenditure used for investments (Investitionsanteil).
